Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class DescribeValueTypeResult

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.DescribeValueTypeResult
public class DescribeValueTypeResult extends Object

Java class for DescribeValueTypeResult complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="DescribeValueTypeResult">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="apiCreatable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="apiDeletable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="apiReadable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="apiUpdatable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="parentField" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ValueTypeField" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="valueTypeFields" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ValueTypeField" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getValueTypeFields

      public List<ValueTypeField> getValueTypeFields()
      Gets the value of the valueTypeFields property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the valueTypeFields property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getValueTypeFields().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ValueTypeField

      Returns:
      The value of the valueTypeFields property.
